div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap;
div.span:
Layer 1: Physical
Bits received
Convert signals to data

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap;
div.span:
Layer 2: Data Link
Remove MAC Header/Trailer
Check frame integrity

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap;
div.span:
Layer 3: Network
Remove IP Header
Route to correct host

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0); display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap;
div.span:
Layer 4: Transport
Remove TCP/UDP Header
Reassemble segments

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap;
div.span:
Layer 7: Application
Deliver to application
User sees data

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap;
div.span:
Layer 7: Application
HTTP, FTP, DNS, SMTP
User data

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap;
div.span:
Layer 6: Presentation
Encryption, Compression
SSL/TLS, JPEG

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap;
div.span:
Layer 5: Session
Session management
NetBIOS, RPC

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0); display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap;
div.span:
Layer 4: Transport
TCP/UDP Headers
Segments/Datagrams
Port numbers

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap;
div.span:
Layer 3: Network
IP Header
Packets
Source/Dest IP addresses

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap;
div.span:
Layer 2: Data Link
MAC Header + Trailer
Frames
Source/Dest MAC addresses

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap;
div.span:
Layer 1: Physical
Bits
Electrical signals, cables
1s and 0s

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: inline-block; white-space: nowrap;

div.span:
PDU at each layer:
L7-L5: Data
L4: Segment/Datagram
L3: Packet
L2: Frame
L1: Bits
